# @andes/close-listener

<br />

A component that listens for close events.

<br />

## How to use

<br />

### Installation

> Follow the [general installation guide](../../docs/installation.md).

```bash

npm install --save @andes/close-listener

```

### Scripts

> Follow the [general scripts usage guide](../../docs/scripts-usage.md) for configuration and how-tos.

Import the component in your page:

```jsx

import { CloseListener } from '@andes/close-listener';

```

## Public API

| Property | Description | Type | Default | Required |
| -------- | ----------- | ---- | ------- | -------- |
| `children` | Custom content. | string | `undefined` | ✅ |
| `onCloseOutside` | The callback function that is executed when a close event is detected. | `func(event)` | `undefined` | ✅ |
| `handleClick` | Indicates whether the component should listen for click events. | `boolean` | `undefined` |  |
| `handleEsc` | Indicates whether the component should listen for Escape key events. | `boolean` | `undefined` |  |
